content: Victims describe how they have been targeted while carrying out everyday activities.

title: More than 70 miners killed in South Sudan as government and opposition trade blame

content: Lebanon’s expulsion of Iranian ambassador tests limits of state power as Hezbollah fights push for disarmament.

title: China bans storing cremated remains in empty 'bone ash apartments'
